calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-14-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ann Mendoza.
Petitioner, Jose Guadalupe Amezcua Hernandez present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Linda Guadalupe Amezcua Hernandez.
Decree signed in open court.
